title: Varied Fabricated Commodities
description: A Fabric remake of Varied Commodities - adds furniture, weapons, decorations, and the Carpentry Bench.
body:
# Varied Fabricated Commodities

A **Fabric remake** of the beloved **Varied Commodities** mod by Noppes_ for Minecraft 1.20.1

Adds a variety of furniture, decorations, weapons, and the iconic **Carpentry Bench** with a 4x4 crafting grid.

![Items in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68972d48903e1d221e3d2e07a0d9ef15125034a.jpeg)

---

## 🎯 Current Features (Alpha v0.2.0)

### 🛠️ Crafting Station
- **Carpentry Bench** - Advanced 4x4 crafting grid for complex recipes
- Craft weapons, furniture, and decorative items that don't fit in the standard 3x3 grid
- Custom recipe system optimized for varied crafting patterns

### ⚔️ Weapons (80+ Total!)

**Complete Arsenal** with 10 material variants each: Wood, Stone, Bronze/Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Demonic, Frost, and Mithril

#### Fast Weapons (2.0 Attack Speed)
- **Spears** - Rapid piercing attacks, perfect for quick combos
- **Tridents** - Three-pronged weapons with high DPS

#### Standard Weapons (1.6 Attack Speed)
- **Dagas** - Lightweight fast weapons with reduced durability
- **Glaives** - Balanced polearms with sword-like damage

#### Medium Weapons (1.4 Attack Speed)
- **Broadswords** - Heavy two-handed swords with +25% durability bonus
- **Scythes** - Area-of-effect weapons with sweep attack

#### Slow Weapons (1.2 Attack Speed)
- **Battle Axes** - High damage weapons balanced between speed and power

#### Very Slow Weapons (1.0 Attack Speed)
- **Warhammers** - Devastating crushing weapons for maximum damage per hit

**Features:**
- Balanced damage and durability for each tier
- Custom holding animations and models
- Full compatibility with combat mods (Better Combat, Epic Fight, etc.)
- All weapons craftable in Carpentry Bench with unique patterns

### 💎 Items & Materials
- **Decorative Coins**: Wood, Stone, Bronze, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond
- **Crafting Ingots**: Steel (smelted from Iron), Demonic, Mithril
- **Gems**: Ruby, Sapphire, Amethyst
- **Special Items**: Demonic Heart, Corrupted Skull, Holy Hand Grenade, Bullets

### 📦 Organization
- Custom creative tab with all mod items organized by category
- Full JEI/REI integration for all recipes
- Base model system for consistent weapon appearance

---

## ⚖️ Weapon Balance Guide

Each weapon type fills a specific combat role:

- **Spears/Tridents (2.0 speed)** - Fast combos, lower damage per hit, high DPS
- **Dagas/Glaives (1.6 speed)** - Balanced all-rounders, versatile
- **Broadswords/Scythes (1.4 speed)** - Good damage, reasonable speed, AOE potential
- **Battle Axes (1.2 speed)** - Heavy hits, solid damage
- **Warhammers (1.0 speed)** - Maximum single-hit damage, devastating but slow

**Material Progression:**
- Bronze (Copper) → Between Stone and Iron
- Emerald → Between Diamond and Netherite-tier
- Demonic → High risk/reward - great damage, low durability
- Frost → Diamond-equivalent using Packed Ice
- Mithril → Legendary tier with extreme durability

---

## 🔮 Planned Features

Future updates will include:

- **Guns & Shields**: Ranged weapons and defensive equipment
- **Armor Sets**: Skirts and full custom armor pieces
- **Furniture**: Tables, Chairs, Couches, Shelves, Beams
- **Decorations**: Lamps, Candles, Pedestals, Banners, Signs, Tombstones
- **Containers**: Crates and Barrels in various wood types
- **Functional Items**: Trading Block, Recipe Book

---

## 📋 Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.17.0 or higher
- **Fabric API**: 0.92.2 or higher

---

## 📜 Credits

**Original Mod**: [Varied Commodities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/varied-commodities) by **Noppes_** (Forge 1.12.2)

**Remake**: **AB Fann** (Fabric 1.20.1)

---

## ⚠️ Alpha Notice

This is an **alpha release** with active development. Many features from the original mod are still being implemented. Balance changes may occur in future updates. Your feedback is appreciated!

---

## 🐛 Report Issues

Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Report it on the issue tracker or leave a comment!

---

## 📊 Version History

- **v0.2.0-alpha** - Massive weapons expansion: 80+ weapons across 8 categories
- **v0.1.0-alpha** - Initial release with Carpentry Bench and basic items
